implementation_notes: Implemented JsonExtractor as a pure-stdlib (json, re) class with a 5-strategy cascade. Strategy 1 uses direct json.loads. Strategy 2 strips ```json/``` code fences. Strategy 3 uses a character-by-character string-aware brace matcher that correctly handles braces inside quoted values and escaped quotes. Strategy 4 repairs literal newline/tab/CR bytes inside JSON string values before re-parsing. Strategy 5 falls back to additional_kwargs['reasoning_content']. normalise_think_closing_tags uses a two-pass approach: first a regex to fix missing-slash closing tags (<think>...<think> → <think>...</think>), then a linear token scan to count unmatched opens and append the missing </think> tags. The __init__.py re-exports JsonExtractor, JsonExtractionError, and normalise_think_closing_tags as a package-level convenience. Tests load the module via importlib.util because the directory name 'langchain-deepagents' contains a hyphen.
requirements_addressed: JsonExtractor.normalise_think_closing_tags() fixing missing-slash and unclosed think tags
Comprehensive pytest test suite with importlib loading pattern

completion_promises.evidence: Strategies 1-4 applied to main content, strategy 5 falls back to reasoning_content. First success wins. Raises JsonExtractionError with descriptive message if all fail.

completion_promises.criterion_text: normalise_think_closing_tags fixes <think>...<think> and unclosed EOF patterns
completion_promises.evidence: Two-pass: regex for missing-slash pattern, token-counting loop for unclosed-at-EOF. Already-correct tags are untouched.

completion_promises.criterion_text: lib/__init__.py exports JsonExtractor, JsonExtractionError, and normalise_think_closing_tags
completion_promises.evidence: __init__.py imports from .json_extractor and exposes all three names plus __all__

completion_promises.criterion_text: Comprehensive pytest test suite with importlib loading pattern
completion_promises.evidence: 55 tests across 9 classes covering all 5 strategies, normalise_think_closing_tags, pipeline ordering, edge cases, and full cascade. Uses importlib.util.spec_from_file_location for hyphenated directory.
